summary: Phase 3 SpaceUI testing complete. All backend APIs (components, examples, methods) working correctly. All 4 documentation pages (Getting Started, Components, Examples, API Reference) render properly with live previews, Lua syntax highlighting, and working Copy buttons. Mobile responsive verified.
seed_data_creation: N/A - Data served from JSON files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 complete. All documentation pages working. Backend endpoints: /api/components (14 items), /api/examples (3 items with toolkit-esp featured), /api/methods (21 items). Frontend pages: /getting-started (5 sections, 4+ code blocks), /components (14 components with previews, snippets, props tables), /examples (3 cards with Copy/View code), /reference (21 methods with signatures, options, returns, examples). Lua syntax highlighting working (keywords bold white, strings light gray, comments dim italic). Mobile responsive (sidebars hidden, no horizontal scroll). All Copy buttons work.

backend: GET /api/components returns 200 with JSON array of exactly 14 components
Each component has id, name, group, description, snippet, props[]
Component IDs match: window, tab, section, button, toggle, slider, dropdown, input, keybind, colorpicker, label, paragraph, divider, notification
GET /api/examples returns 200 with JSON array of exactly 3 examples
Example IDs match: hello-world, settings-panel, toolkit-esp
toolkit-esp contains only monochrome Color3 values (no saturated colors)
GET /api/methods returns 200 with JSON array of 21 methods
Each method has id, group, signature, description, options, returns, example
frontend: Home page loads with navbar (Docs, Components, Examples, API links)
API link correctly points to /reference (not /api-reference)
/getting-started: Hero title contains 'SpaceUI'
/getting-started: Sticky TOC sidebar with 5 links (Installation, Your first window, Config system, Toggle key, Parenting & executor compat)
/getting-started: 5 section headings present
/getting-started: 4+ code blocks with working Copy buttons
/components: Hero with 'Components' title and '14 components' badge
/components: Sidebar with 14 component links grouped (Layout, Interactive, Static, Global)
/components: 14 component sections with preview cards, Lua snippets, and props tables
/components: Copy buttons work on snippets
/examples: 3 example cards (hello-world, settings-panel, toolkit-esp)
/examples: toolkit-esp has 'Featured' badge
/examples: 'Copy script' buttons work and show 'Copied' state
/examples: 'View code' buttons expand CodeBlock
/reference: Hero with 'Every method, every option' title
/reference: Sidebar grouped by SpaceUI, Window, Tab, Components, Component
/reference: 21 method sections with signature boxes, descriptions, options tables, returns text, example CodeBlocks
/reference: Copy buttons work on method examples
Lua syntax highlighting: keywords (local, function, end) are white (#ffffff) and bold (fontWeight=600)
Lua syntax highlighting: strings are light gray (rgb(201, 201, 201))
Lua syntax highlighting: comments are dim (rgb(107, 107, 107)) and italic
Mobile responsive (390x844): sidebars hidden, navbar clean, no horizontal scroll on all pages
